title: pratia angulata
intro: Pratia angulata, also known as blue star Creeper or Paterson's curse, is a perennial herb native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Pratia angulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Pratia angulata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds.
